speaker: speaker1
text: Like a cat on hot bricks , as you might say . I don ’ t believe you are listening at all .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sorry , I just worried about him . You know , he should be here an hour ago .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don ’ t worry him , he has been grown up and I think he can take himself very well .

speaker: speaker2
text: But he still does not come back .

speaker: speaker1
text: Maybe he is on the way home now .
